context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the plan-tickets instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Create in issue tracker:**

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Verify the target project/board details first.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Create issues **only after** the plan is considered approved enough.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use whatever integration the user has (API, MCP, UI); do not assume credentials in the repo.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Omit fields the project does not require. Confirm actual field names from the tracker's create-metadata endpoint before issuing the call. Do not set status on create — use the project's default initial status.
